title: Performium Nano
description: A true barebones fork of Performium.
body:
![Performium Nano](https://i.imgur.com/eEDORmm.png)

# About Performium Nano
**Performium Nano** is the ultra-lightweight, barebones fork of **Performium** focused purely on maximizing Minecraft performance. Stripped of all non-essential mods, it delivers a clean, minimal experience with zero compromises on speed and efficiency.


# Features
✅ **Pure Performance** – Only the essential performance mods for lightning-fast gameplay.  
✅ **Minimalist Setup** – No shaders, no zoom, no extras—just Minecraft running at its best.  
✅ **Optimized for Stability** – Designed to minimize lag and maximize performance on any machine.  
✅ **Broad Compatibility** – Supports **Minecraft 1.21.5+** and works with:   
   - 🟢 **Modrinth App**
   - 🟢 **Prism Launcher**
   - 🟢 **ATLauncher**

Always use the latest **Performium Nano** version for the smoothest, most efficient Minecraft experience.


# Installation (Modrinth App)
1. **Download & Install** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Login** with your Minecraft account.
3. **Browse** on the left sidebar.
4. **Search** for `Performium Nano`.
5. **Download & Install** the first result.


# Versioning System
**Performium Nano** follows the same structured versioning format as Performium:

```
v[ModpackVersion]-[Stage]+[Build]
```

## Example Versions
- `v1.0.0-Alpha+1` – Fist alpha build of version 1.0.0
- `v1.0.0-Beta+1` – First beta build of version 1.0.0
- `v1.0.0-Release+1` – First stable build of version 1.0.0

## Breakdown
- **v[ModpackVersion]** → Uses **Semantic Versioning** (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)
- **[Stage]** → Alpha, Beta, or Release
- **[Build]** → Build Number for each Version

# Support & Community
No support will be offered at this time.
